expectations.text: CartCommandClient is generated with addCartItem method
expectations.evidence: Generated CartApiClient with 'item' method instead of CartCommandClient with 'addCartItem' method. The generator did not recognize the Wow CQRS pattern despite the skill providing guidance.

expectations.text: QueryClientFactory is generated for snapshot queries
expectations.evidence: No QueryClientFactory generated - only CartApiClient with 'single' method. The bounded context 'ecommerce.cart' was resolved but no command/query client separation was created.

expectations.text: Event query client is generated for event.list_query operations
expectations.evidence: No event.list_query operation exists in the ecommerce.yaml spec, so no event query client was generated

expectations.text: Generated code uses Wow CQRS patterns correctly
expectations.evidence: Generated standard API client (CartApiClient) instead of CQRS command/query clients. The generator resolved 0 bounded context aggregates despite skill guidance.
